calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Fred Keeperman, Esq. for Plaintiff: The National Collection Agency, Inc., a Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Chris Cassidy, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Amherst Associates Construction, Inc. a Corporation, and Kaicheng Tang aka Kai-Cheng Tang as follows:
Damages $30,727.82
Prejudgment Interest $2,519.12
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00, for a total of $36,071.94
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Continued To Apr-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
